name: Mary Peeples Cubbedge
motto: "Act well your part; there all the honor lies."

name: Joseph Robinson Cumming
motto: "A horse is valuable only when well broke—how different with man."

name: Jefferson Dewey Davis
motto: "It's not what you are; it's what other people think of you."

name: Emmett Oliver Dobbs, Jr.
motto: "The set of the soul determines the goal."

name: John Thomas Dolvin
motto: "Knowledge planted in youth giveth shade in old age."

name: JESSE WALTER DREW
motto: "Be yourself at all times and you will be happy."

name: ELIZABETH ALLEENE EPPS
motto: "Judge thou me by what I am."

name: Roy Edwin Estes
motto: "Happy I am; from care I'm free."

name: Guy Washington Findley
motto: "Youth a blunder, manhood a struggle, and old age a regret."

name: Frances Forbes
motto: "There's nothing neither good nor bad, but thinking makes it so."

name: Winifred Amanda Fowler
motto: "When you play, play hard; when you work, don't play at all."

name: Lorimer Bassett Freeman
motto: "I am the heir of all the ages in the foremost files of time."

name: WILLIAM RYAN FRIER, JR.
motto: "And when at last the fight is won, God keep me still unsatisfied."

name: MACK CARTER FROST
motto: "Be not overcome with evil, but overcome evil with good."

name: JAMES AUBREY GARRARD
motto: "Whatever is worth doing at all is worth doing well."
clubs: Fourth Corps Area Infantry Rifle Team
Instructor, Rifle Marksmanship, National Matches, Camp Perry, Ohio

name: ARTHUR MATHEWSON GIGNILLIAT
motto: "In this blind pursuit of mirages, 'donnez-moi un livre et une amie.'"
clubs: Vice-Chairman, State Council of Y. M. C. A.

name: ESTHER GODBEE
major: Candidate for B. S. H. E. Degree

name: MINNIE GOLDING
motto: "Laugh and the world laughs with you."

name: ROBERT HALL GRACEY
motto: "Forget the past, but so live in the present that the future will take care of itself."

name: DAVID GREENFIELD
motto: "A crook in the hand is worth two in the nose."

name: ALLEN PARK GRIMES
motto: "Work well done makes pleasure more fun."

name: THOMAS JEFFERSON HAMILTON, JR.
motto: "The little white prayers of Elspeth Fry Float up the arches into the sky, A little black bird on the belfry high Pecks at them as they go by."

name: JAMES FRAMPTON HANAHAN
motto: "Friendships lie at every hand if one but seeks them out."

name: WILLIAM DEARING HARDEN, II
motto: "Truth is our most precious possession—therefore let us conserve it."

name: MAX MEYERHARDT HARDIE
motto: "Man's life is short, but full of how he lives it."

name: Benjamin Hill Hardy, Jr.
motto: ". . . he jested with all ease, and told Free tales, and took the word and played upon it."
major: Candidate for A.B.J. and A.M. Degrees

name: Thomas Jewell Harrold
motto: "Never argue with a wasp, he always carries his point."

name: Isaac Kline Hay
motto: "When the heart dares to speak no preparation is needed."

name: Richard Willis Heard
motto: "The tragedy beneath the world's surface can only be borne by laughter."

name: John Horace Henderson
motto: "Character is the corner stone of all success."

name: Joseph Kohn Heyman
motto: "Heard melodies are sweet, but those unheard are sweeter."

name: Sarah Heyman
motto: "You may be as orthodox as the Devil and as wicked."

name: IVY MAY HIXSON
motto: "All that we send into the lives of others, comes back into our own."
clubs: Secretary-Treasurer, Students' League of Women Voters

name: ONIE ELIZABETH HIXSON
motto: "Where there's a will there's a way."

name: JAMES FRANKLIN HOLLINGSWORTH
motto: "Life consists not in holding a good hand, but in playing a poor hand well."

name: JOHN EDWARD HUGHES
motto: "The strength of your life is determined by the strength of your will."

name: EMMETT HARRIS JACKSON
motto: "The man who blushes is not quite a brute."

name: John Robert Jennette
motto: "Eat, drink, and be merry; for tomorrow you may die."

name: Robert Jay Jernigan
motto: "A winner never quits and a quitter never wins."

name: John Carlton Jester, Jr.
motto: "I am the master of my fate, I am the captain of my soul."
clubs: Lightweight Boxing Champion, University of Georgia

name: Jake Brandt Joel
motto: "A few understanding friends, that know me and love me just the same."

name: David Weems Johnson
motto: "He who is accompanied by noble thoughts is never alone."

name: William Thomson Johnson
motto: "Make every failure a stepping stone to success."

name: Otis Crittenden Joiner
motto: "Keep thy tools ready and God will find thee work."

name: Mary Adeline Keener
motto: "Your actions speak so loudly I can not hear what you say."

name: Thomas Clarence Kendrick, Jr.
motto: "Forever bear without abuse the grand old name of 'gentleman.'"

name: Elizabeth Ellis Kennedy
motto: "True happiness comes in making others happy."

name: Emma Keys
motto: "It is better to have the true love of one than the flattering love of many."

name: Otis Glenn Lancaster
motto: "To strive, to seek, to find and not to yield."

name: Winsor Letton
motto: "People who live in glass houses should be careful of their visitors."

name: John Robertson Lewis
motto: "It's great to have a smile that smiles."

name: Russell Frederick Newcomb
motto: "Have a good time while you can."

name: Alfred Benjamin Newton
motto: "War is hell, and so is astronomy."

name: Andrew Jackson Osteen
motto: "What I can not deny, I will own."

name: Walter Ennis Parker
motto: "I live my life today, tomorrow may never come."

name: Zeph Eugenia Pate
motto: "As a man thinketh in his heart, so is he."

name: Latrelle Patrick
motto: "A laugh is worth a thousand groans in any market."

name: Robert Lee Patterson, Jr.
description: One of Four Candidates for Rhodes Scholarship.

name: John Thomas Persall, Jr.
motto: "I may break in a storm but ne'er will I sway in a breath."

name: Golden Aurelius Pirkle
motto: "Fill each fleeting day, with dream and work and play."

name: Jewell Pitts
motto: "Not too serious, not too gay, but a rare good fellow when it comes to play."

name: Edwin Aldine Pound, II
motto: "The way to have friends is to be one."

name: Charles McDowell Preston, Jr.
motto: "Avoid falsity and do as your true self directs."

name: John Gatewood Pryor
motto: "The greatest pleasure that I find is to maintain a quiet mind."

name: Joseph Hicks Pyron
motto: "Defeat is only for him who accepts it."

name: GUY AUSTIN RACE
motto: "Then let us not in hurry waste our lives."

name: VIRGINIA RAY
motto: "The one who always wins is the one who thinks he can."

name: MRS. ELLEN PRATT RHODES
motto: "Genius is one-tenth inspiration and nine-tenths perspiration."

name: JOHN REED ROBERTS, JR.
motto: "Marry ambition, son, and spend your honeymoon among the stars."

name: George Henderson Robinson
motto: "Move over and make a place for me at the top."

name: Margaret Rogers
motto: "Love doing, and not the credit you get for it."

name: Roselle Rosenthal
motto: "The dreamer lives forever; the toiler dies in a day."

name: Alice Alden Rowland
motto: "Who brings sunshine into his life, has sunshine in his own."

name: Willa Sanborn
motto: "Keep on goin', don't stay still—some won't like you, but others will."

name: Mary Agnes Sanders
motto: "So little done, so much to do."

name: Ephraim Scharfman
motto: "Knowledge comes to those who earn it."

name: Horace DeWitte Shattuck
motto: "Victory is fine but wisdom is acquired through defeat."

name: Herbert Samuel Shearouse
motto: "To live, that the world may be better because I have lived."

name: Evelyn Hilton Sherman
motto: "To love too much has been the only art I used."
clubs: Assistant Society Editor, Red and Black

name: Ivey Mervin Shiver, Jr.
motto: "One life to live, let that be nothing less than your best."

name: Addison Wingfield Simpson, Jr.
motto: "A little bull goes a long way."
clubs: Winner, Little International Saddle and Sirloin Honor Key

name: James Luther Smalley
motto: "Play your best cards in the game of life."

name: Mary Roslyn Smalley
motto: "In all things be simple, modest and sweet."

name: Bernice Eley Smith
motto: "True life lies in laughter, love and work."

name: Frances Elizabeth Smith
motto: "Everything is possible until it is dispensed."

name: Henry Eugene Smith
motto: "Give the best to the world and the world will give the best back to you."

name: Louise Smith
motto: "Many are cold but few are frozen."

name: Robert Wilson Smith
motto: "But what he treasures most when travelling ends, is love and faith and those few smiling friends."

name: John Frank Sparrow
motto: "Never trouble trouble until trouble troubles you."

name: Percy Marvin Spiers
motto: "Hold your eyes on the goal; never mind the passing moment."

name: Jennie Claire Steed
motto: "Act well your part, there all the honor lies."

name: Clara Maybelle Stith
motto: "Better to make one rejoice with glee than plant a desert with a colony."

name: George Henry Clement Stone
motto: "Be frank to yourself and to your fellow men."

name: Howard Kulman Story
motto: "Lend every man thine ear, but few thy voice."

name: Wilburn Lesca Strickland
motto: "To be cautious is to save a fall."

name: Harry Erwin Talmadge
motto: "Big things seem small after they have been acquired."

name: Goss Thomas
motto: "There is never anything lost by fighting for a good cause."

name: Friar Matthews Thompson, Jr.
motto: "Why worry, things are bound to happen."

name: Marie Ussery Tibbetts
motto: "If time lets stop one little perfect hour, take it—for it may never come again."

name: James Fleming Touchstone
motto: "Every action is measured by the depth of sentiment from which it proceeds."

name: Daniel Curtis Tully
motto: "The evil that men do lives after them."

name: Comer Lester Vandiver
motto: "Keep on trying—struggle is the father of victory."

name: Earl Morgan Varner
motto: "It matters not what you do—It's only in the point of view."

name: John Wesley Waller
motto: "A ready smile lifts a world of sorrow."

name: George Walter Ward
motto: "Do unto others as you would have others do unto you."

name: William Alton Ward
motto: "Be it pleasant or otherwise, I'll take it as it comes."

name: Ed Milton Watkins
motto: "Professors and classes are my only objections to a college education."

name: JUDSON DURWARD WATSON
motto: "If thou regrettest thy youth, why live?"

name: MARY ESTELLE WELLS
motto: "As we therefore have opportunity, let us do good to all men."

name: GEORGE DOUGLAS WHITE
motto: "Nothing is good or bad; only thinking makes it so."

name: KATISUE WHITEHEAD
motto: "Silence is the only successful substitute for brains."
clubs: Vice-President, Student League of Women Voters

name: THOMAS AUGUSTUS WITCHER
motto: "Il n'y a pas de justice ici bas."

name: HOKE SMITH WOFFORD
motto: "The bull is mightier than the bullet."

name: MARY ELIZABETH WOOD
motto: "Muse not that I thus proceed; for what I will, I will, and there's an end."

name: MAY EMMA WOOD
motto: "If we always face the sunshine, the shadows will fall behind."

name: MURIEL WOOD
motto: "To be alive, to think, to yearn, to strive."

name: JAMES CHRISTOPHER WRIGHT
motto: "Happiness lies in the pursuit of one's own true interests."

name: WILLIAM HALL YOUNG, JR.
motto: "The best way to rid oneself of temptation is to yield to it."
